(2) Fat. 430 (a), ara 10 ater, 2003; (3) Tat. 270 (a), aera 27 Hea, 2004; (4) #1.a1.1170 (a), ate 20 aaezax, 2004; (5) #T.a.1017 (a), aa 15 Fars, 2005; (6) *T.8T.1012 (a), aera 15 are, 2015; (7) FLAT. 2688 (a1), arte 1 area, 2015; (8) ATA. 3319 (a), aa 25 azeaz, 2016; -- 2 of 4 -- (aT HVS 3(ii)] WT BT TATA | TATTOO 3 (9) ra, 21 (a), aréha 3 TT, 2017; ae (10) #T.at, 2288 (a), athe 4 eH, 2018 | MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (DEPARTMENT OF COMMERCE) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31° July, 2020 §.0.2560(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (3) and (5) of section 30 of the Tea Act, 1953 (29 of 1953), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments further to amend the Tea (Marketing) Control Order, 2003, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement.- (1) This order may be called the Tea (Marketing) Control (Amendment) Order, 2020. (2) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2 In the Tea (Marketing) Control Order, 2003, (hereinafter referred to as the principal Order), for the existing Form ‘B’, the following Form shall be substituted, namely:- “FORM — B [See Paragraph 3(4)] Certificate of registration for carrying on business as manufacturer of tea. NOT transferable. Issued under paragraph 3(4) of the Tea (Marketing) Control Order, 2003. Certificate of Registration NO. ......ccccccceeeee rece eee Shri/Sarvshri eeeeseoeeessarneerueseiseeuasseeenecemnmeeseemen caste is/are hereby authorized to carry on the business of manufacturer of made teas (CTC/Orthodox/green/white tea/etc.) under the provisions of Tea (Marketing) Control Order, 2003 with an annual installed capacity of .................e Lakh kgs of made teas. This certificate shall continue to be valid until cancelled/suspended by the Registering Authority under paragraph 5 of the Tea (Marketing) Control Order, 2003. Deputy Chairman, Tea Board Registering Authority”. By In the principal Order, in Form L, after the words “500 kilograms per day”, the words “and the annual installed capacity is .............. kgs of made tea (CTC/Orthodox/green/white tea/etc.)” shall be inserted. [F. No. K-57012(13)/4/2020-PLANT-A] DIWAKAR NATH MISHRA, Jt.
